steps.name: Sign in by email and password
Add products to cart: [Cotton Mull Embroidered Dress, Men Tshirt, Half Sleeves Top Schiffli Detailing - Pink, Long Maxi Tulle Fancy Dress Up Outfits -Pink, Summer White Top]
Add product [Cotton Mull Embroidered Dress] and close success notification
Add product to cart from [Filtered products list]: Cotton Mull Embroidered Dress
Check notification has success added product to cart message
Add product [Men Tshirt] and close success notification
Add product to cart from [Filtered products list]: Men Tshirt
Check notification has success added product to cart message
Add product [Half Sleeves Top Schiffli Detailing - Pink] and close success notification
Add product to cart from [Filtered products list]: Half Sleeves Top Schiffli Detailing - Pink

parameters.value: Half Sleeves Top Schiffli Detailing - Pink

Natus voluptatum nostrum sed accusantium maiores. Rem consequuntur facere error ducimus. Aspernatur ipsum illum pariatur similique quasi.
